nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Pharaoh will not listen to you, so that My wonders will be multiplied in the land of Egypt.”

esv.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Pharaoh will not listen to you, that my wonders may be multiplied in the land of Egypt.”

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“法老必不聽你們的話，好使我的神蹟在埃及地加增起來。”

ccb.text: 耶和华曾对摩西说：“法老一定不肯听你的话，因此我要在埃及多行神迹。”
